subject: [PATCH mm-unstable 1/1] mm: fix deferred split queue races during migration

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Questioned the assessment that checking for underused folios is about determining if they are used by anyone in the system. Suggested looking at anonymous folio locking behavior.

reviews.author: Usama Arif
reviews.summary: Acknowledged the fix, but expressed uncertainty about the goto next if folio is locked in deferred_split_scan(). Suggested that the reasoning behind this change might be flawed.

2026-04-01.patch_summary: Deferred split queue race fix during migration, but handling of locked folios is questioned.
